evals.prompt: I just installed cogni-visual and cogni-portfolio plugins but excalidraw tools aren't showing up. Can you set up the MCP servers I need?
evals.expected_output: Should detect that mcp_excalidraw is needed (git-based), check if Pencil is needed, detect Desktop config, run install-mcp.sh, patch claude_desktop_config.json with dry-run preview, and verify tools via ToolSearch.

evals.prompt: My claude_desktop_config.json is missing the excalidraw entry. Can you fix it without reinstalling everything?
evals.expected_output: Should detect that the git-installed server already exists (skip re-install), focus on patching the Desktop config only. Should show dry-run first, then patch after confirmation.

evals.prompt: I want to update all my MCP servers to their latest versions. The excalidraw canvas has been buggy.
evals.expected_output: Should run install-mcp.sh with --force to pull latest and rebuild, then re-patch Desktop config if needed. Should verify the updated server loads correctly.
